plan_section: Step 10: Final integration, browser validation, and cleanup

plan_alignment.notes: Changes align with Step 10 follow-up fixes: MQTT ingestion behavior is documented in the step plan, API routes are forced to Node dynamic runtime, and OCI license metadata is GPL-compatible.

correctness_safety.notes: Prior blocker is resolved: explicit full snapshot payloads such as [] and {"nodes": []} now replace the cached node list with an empty array. Incremental node payloads merge without clearing existing links/routes.

code_quality.notes: Implementation is readable, localized, and uses helper functions for MQTT config identity, payload classification, node merging, and keyed link/route updates.

completeness.notes: FIX-1 and FIX-2 are addressed, including password-sensitive MQTT client recreation and final verification notes supplied by the implementer.

patterns.notes: The solution remains within the existing map snapshot/provider pattern and keeps MQTT handling server-side.

integration.notes: Imports, route runtime settings, and map snapshot contracts integrate cleanly with the existing API shape and map stats builder.

flags.note: Reviewer noted that {"data": []} was not treated as a full snapshot. This was fixed after review by including Array.isArray(record.data) in full snapshot detection; lint and typecheck passed afterward.
